Solana Network Metrics Milestone** | YES | MEDIUM confidence
As of April 14, 2026, Solana reached an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders with daily non-vote transactions hitting historic highs of 148 million.[1] This is confirmable on-chain data but may not constitute market-moving "news" in the prediction market sense.

signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Progress** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Progress** | YES | HIGH confidence
The Alpenglow consensus upgrade passed governance voting with 98.27% approval and aims to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds.[1][7] This represents a confirmed protocol milestone rather than breaking news, as it was already anticipated infrastructure development.
